calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-29-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Tony Ruch, Esq. for the Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority. Plaintiff's Witness Miguel Paltac, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Lashonta Bateast, and Antoine Johnson.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 512 Alemany Blvd., San Francisco, CA. 94110
The lease is forfeited.
Back Rent and Holdover Damages - $7,372.00
No attoreny fee or cost requested.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: Jwillis-McGhee; Not Reported.

Case did not settle.
No appearance by the Defendant.
Trial date confirmed.
